title: Queen of the Seas
writer: Ernesto Gastaldi, Ugo Guerra, Luciano Martino
actors: Lisa Gastoni, Jerome Courtland, Walter Barnes
plot: Redhead Mary is a girl who dresses like a man to better approach, and rob the jewels worn by the pretty ladies of her time. The King's Guard captures her, and she finds herself in the same cell with Peter Goodwin, a nobleman - who...
